_comment: MCP servers bundled with sevaai-sdlc-toolkit. Each entry is OPT-IN — Claude Code prompts before authenticating. URLs are official endpoints where known; edit if your tenant uses a private endpoint. Add your own under mcpServers using the _custom_endpoint_template format at the bottom.

atlassian-rovo._purpose: Stages 1, 2, 5 — Jira tickets, Confluence ADRs and PRDs, compliance docs
atlassian-rovo._free_tier: Atlassian Cloud free for up to 10 users

linear._purpose: Stage 1 — issue tracker, alternative to Jira
linear._free_tier: Linear free for up to 10 users

asana._purpose: Stage 1 — project management, alternative to Jira/Linear
asana._free_tier: Asana Personal free up to 15 users

notion._purpose: Stages 1, 2 — long-form PRDs, ADRs, knowledge base
notion._free_tier: Notion free tier covers personal use; team workspaces are paid

slack._purpose: Stages 1, 7 — capture requirements from threads; route deploy/incident comms

miro._purpose: Stage 2 — visual whiteboarding, journey maps, system diagrams

figma._purpose: Stage 2 — pull UI design context for visual features

stoplight._purpose: Stage 2 — host the OpenAPI spec produced by the design stage

postman._purpose: Stages 2, 4 — API contracts and contract testing

github._purpose: Stages 2-6 — repo structure, ADRs in repo, PRs, Actions, Dependabot, IaC
github._free_tier: GitHub Free for personal and small teams
github._install_note: Local server. Set GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN in your env first.

gitlab._purpose: Stages 2-6 — alternative to GitHub for repo, MRs, pipelines

azure-devops._purpose: Stages 2-6 — Microsoft stack repos, pipelines, work items
azure-devops._free_tier: Azure DevOps free for first 5 users

sourcegraph._purpose: Stage 3 — code search across many repos when codebase is huge

snyk._purpose: Stage 5 — vulnerability scanning, license compliance, IaC misconfig
snyk._free_tier: Snyk free for individuals and small teams

auth0._purpose: Stage 5 — auth and identity provider config (Okta-owned)
auth0._free_tier: Auth0 Free up to 7,500 active users

vercel._purpose: Stage 6 — frontend deploys, preview URLs, analytics

netlify._purpose: Stage 6 — alternative to Vercel for static / Jamstack deploys

aws._purpose: Stage 6 — read live AWS infra (ECS, Lambda, RDS, EKS, S3) for deploy plans
aws._free_tier: AWS Free tier; multiple official MCP servers — pick per service
aws._install_note: AWS publishes per-service MCP servers; see https://github.com/awslabs/mcp

google-compute-engine._purpose: Stage 6 — read live GCE infrastructure state

cloudflare-developer-platform._purpose: Stage 6 — Workers, KV, R2 state for edge-deployed projects

launchdarkly._purpose: Stage 6 — feature flag state and rollout schedule

terraform-cloud._purpose: Stage 6 — IaC plan and run state
terraform-cloud._free_tier: Terraform Cloud Free up to 5 users

sentry._purpose: Stage 7 — error patterns feeding the runbook
sentry._free_tier: Sentry Developer Plan: 5K errors/month, free forever

pagerduty._purpose: Stage 7 — on-call schedules, paging commands in runbook
pagerduty._free_tier: PagerDuty Developer Plan: free for individual developers

honeycomb._purpose: Stage 7 — SLO definitions grounded in real telemetry

datadog._purpose: Stage 7 — APM + logs + dashboards. Most common commercial APM.

new-relic._free_tier: New Relic Free up to 100GB/mo ingest

grafana-cloud._purpose: Stage 7 — dashboards / Loki logs / Tempo traces / OnCall paging
grafana-cloud._free_tier: Grafana Cloud Free tier (includes OSS stack)

splunk._purpose: Stage 7 — log search and SOC integrations

incident-io._purpose: Stage 7 — incident management, alternative to PagerDuty
incident-io._free_tier: incident.io has paid plans only beyond a small trial

betterstack._purpose: Stage 7 — uptime monitoring and status page

_custom_endpoint_template._purpose: TEMPLATE — copy and rename to add your own MCP. Delete this entry from your fork. Both `http` (remote) and `command` (local stdio) styles are supported.
